meaning: n.民意测验专家,整理民意测验结果的人
examples: I wanted Greenberg to be my pollster.
Only a fifth of voters want them, says Forsa, a pollster.
Mono Research, a pollster, estimates support for Mr Lee and the GNP at just 33%.
YouGov, a pollster, recently compared voters who called themselves English with those who identified as British.
According to IBOPE, a pollster, 74% of Brazilians expect this year to be better than last.
